title: Tasty Turkish Cheese Pide
description: A weeknight Turkish dish featuring melted cheese and mustard, cooked to perfection in a raclette-grill, this Jain-friendly pide is perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Combine flour, salt, sugar, and yeast in a large mixing bowl
Gradually add lukewarm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour
Preheat the raclette-grill to medium-high heat
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick
Place a quarter of the Turkish cheese in the center of each circle
Spread a tablespoon of mustard over the cheese
Fold the dough over the filling to form a pide shape, and press the edges to seal
Brush the tops with olive oil and cook in the raclette-grill for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown
